title: Fix mux mapping for xilinx techno when all inputs are x
body:
Fixes https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/issues/4590 where a bit-banged mux has all inputs at `x`.
This case can happen when the selection input signal is originally larger than the data source.
Mapping of underlying smaller muxes end up having to handle upper mux with all inputs at `x` which was not handled.
The root cause was identified by @KrystalDelusion.

To fix the crash, handling of the case where all inputs are `x` is explicitly handled, in that case the output is simply assigned to `x`.

Tested on the reproducer poster on https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/issues/4590
